jobs.title: Applied AI Agent Developer
jobs.snippet: Binance Accelerator Program (Tech Seeds 2026). Hands-on builder role at the intersection of LLMs and production systems, working alongside full-time engineers on agent workflows, tool integrations, and AI system architecture.
jobs.description:
## About Binance & the Accelerator Program

Binance is the world's leading blockchain ecosystem and cryptocurrency infrastructure provider. The Binance Accelerator Program (Tech Seeds 2026) is an immersive fixed-term program for early career talent seeking exposure to AI engineering in a global fintech environment.

## About the Role

As an Applied AI Agent Developer you will be a hands-on builder at the intersection of LLMs and production systems. You'll work alongside full-time engineers on agent workflows, tool integrations, backend services, and AI system architecture that power Binance's products at scale.

## Responsibilities

- Design, build, and iterate AI agents and agentic workflows using LLM frameworks (LangChain, LangGraph)
- Develop and integrate agent tools: APIs, internal services, databases, knowledge sources, and operational systems
- Improve agent quality, latency, reliability, safety, and cost through systematic testing
- Identify business friction points and build agentic solutions using the latest tooling from Google & Anthropic
- Collaborate with cross-functional teams across engineering and product

## Requirements

- Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, Data Science, Mathematics, or related field
- 0–3 years of software engineering, AI engineering, or relevant internship/project experience
- Strong programming fundamentals in Python, Java, or TypeScript
- Familiarity with LLM concepts, prompt engineering, and agent architectures
- Hybrid work from Sydney HQ; catered lunches and daily mindfulness sessions on-site

## Benefits

- Competitive fixed-term compensation
- Hybrid work arrangement, St Peters, Sydney
- Exposure to Web3 and global fintech AI systems
- Networking with Binance's global engineering talent network

jobs.title: Applied AI Application Engineer
jobs.snippet: Binance Accelerator Program 2026. Building customer-facing AI applications using LLMs at scale, experimenting with LangGraph, DSPy, and tools from Google & Anthropic in a production fintech environment.
jobs.description:
## About the Role

The Applied AI Application Engineer role is part of the Binance Accelerator Program (Tech Seeds 2026), a fixed-term early-career program. You'll focus on building and deploying scalable customer-facing AI products and ML systems using the latest GenAI tooling.

## Responsibilities

- Build and deploy scalable AI applications leveraging LLMs in production
- Experiment with LangGraph, DSPy, and tools from Google & Anthropic
- Design and productionise ML pipelines using MLOps and CI/CD best practices
- Deploy solutions on AWS cloud environments with monitoring and observability
- Collaborate on identifying business use cases and translating them to AI solutions

## Requirements

- 0–3 years of software or AI engineering experience (internship counts)
- Proficiency in Python; experience with cloud platforms (AWS preferred)
- Understanding of LLM APIs, prompt engineering, and RAG fundamentals
- Strong communication skills and ability to work in agile teams
- Interest in Web3, fintech, and global technology infrastructure

## Benefits

- Fixed-term contract with competitive compensation
- Hybrid working from Sydney (St Peters HQ)
- Access to Binance's engineering community and mentorship

jobs.title: Data Scientist (AI/LLM)
jobs.snippet: Binance Accelerator Program. Contribute to the design and development of AI agents integrated into live systems. Design, prototype, and iterate AI agent workflows using LangChain or LangGraph.
jobs.description:
## About the Role

This Data Scientist (AI/LLM) position is part of the Binance Accelerator Program (Tech Seeds 2026). You'll contribute to designing and deploying AI agents integrated into Binance's live operational systems.

## Responsibilities

- Contribute to design and development of AI agents integrated into live production systems
- Design, prototype, and iterate agent workflows using LangChain or LangGraph
- Analyse data to identify patterns, validate model outputs, and measure agent performance
- Build dashboards and reporting pipelines for LLM system observability
- Collaborate with engineering teams to improve agent reliability and accuracy

## Requirements

- 0–3 years of data science or AI/ML engineering experience
- Strong Python skills; experience with pandas, numpy, and ML frameworks
- Familiarity with LLM APIs (OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini) and prompt engineering
- Understanding of statistical methods and A/B testing fundamentals
- Experience with SQL and data pipeline tools is a plus

## Benefits

- Fixed-term Binance Accelerator Program compensation
- Hybrid Sydney-based role with exposure to global AI systems
- Career pathway into Binance's full-time engineering and data science teams

jobs.title: Senior Machine Learning Engineer (Canva AI)
jobs.snippet: Join Canva's AI team to build and productionise ML models, pipelines, and AI systems at scale. Deploy solutions in cloud environments using MLOps, CI/CD, and monitoring best practices.
jobs.description:
## About Canva

Canva is Australia's leading design platform with over 220 million users worldwide. The Canva AI team is building next-generation AI-powered design features including generative AI, smart recommendations, and multimodal systems.

## About the Role

As a Senior ML Engineer in the Canva AI team, you'll lead the development and productionisation of machine learning models that power Canva's AI-driven design features at scale.

## Responsibilities

- Build and productionise ML models, pipelines, and AI systems deployed to millions of users
- Lead design and implementation of scalable ML infrastructure and serving systems
- Drive MLOps practices: CI/CD pipelines, monitoring, experiment tracking, and model lifecycle management
- Deploy and operate production ML solutions on AWS/GCP cloud environments
- Mentor junior engineers and contribute to ML platform strategy
- Collaborate with research scientists, product managers, and engineering teams

## Requirements

- 5+ years of ML engineering experience in production environments
- Deep expertise in Python and ML frameworks (PyTorch, TensorFlow, JAX)
- Experience with large-scale ML training and serving infrastructure
- Proficiency with cloud ML platforms (AWS SageMaker, GCP Vertex AI)
- Strong understanding of MLOps, model monitoring, and deployment patterns
- Experience with LLMs, diffusion models, or multimodal AI is highly desirable

## Benefits

- Equity in one of Australia's most valuable tech companies
- Flexible hybrid working from Sydney CBD
- Generous learning & development budget
- Canva's industry-leading benefits and wellness programs

jobs.title: Machine Learning Engineer (Data & AI Research)
jobs.snippet: Join Canva's Data AI Research team. Build and scale ML systems to solve complex data and AI research problems. Work with massive-scale real-time data.
jobs.description:
## About the Role

Canva's Data & AI Research team is looking for a Machine Learning Engineer to build systems that push the boundaries of AI research applied to design. You'll work with massive-scale real-time data to advance Canva's AI capabilities.

## Responsibilities

- Build ML systems and infrastructure to support AI research at Canva
- Develop data pipelines and tooling for large-scale model training and evaluation
- Implement and optimise ML algorithms in production
- Collaborate with research scientists to translate research into production-ready systems
- Contribute to feature engineering, model evaluation, and experimentation frameworks

## Requirements

- 3–5 years of ML engineering experience
- Strong Python skills and experience with PyTorch or similar frameworks
- Experience with large-scale distributed data processing (Spark, Flink, or equivalent)
- Solid understanding of ML fundamentals: supervised/unsupervised learning, deep learning
- Experience with cloud platforms (AWS or GCP) and containerisation (Docker, Kubernetes)

## Benefits

- Hybrid working from Canva's Sydney office
- Equity and competitive salary
- Collaborative and research-driven team culture

jobs.title: Staff Machine Learning Engineer (User Voice)
jobs.snippet: Staff-level ML Engineering role on Canva's User Voice team. Lead ML architecture for voice and natural language features. Shape technical direction with real autonomy at massive scale.
jobs.description:
## About the Role

As a Staff Machine Learning Engineer on the User Voice team, you'll lead the technical direction for ML systems powering Canva's voice and natural language understanding features. This is a founding technical leadership role with real autonomy.

## Responsibilities

- Define and execute the ML technical strategy for Canva's voice and NLP features
- Design and build highly scalable ML systems serving hundreds of millions of users
- Lead architecture decisions across the ML stack: data, training, serving, and monitoring
- Mentor and grow a team of ML engineers; establish engineering best practices
- Partner with product, design, and research to shape the product roadmap
- Drive MLOps culture including model evaluation, A/B testing, and continuous deployment

## Requirements

- 8+ years of ML engineering experience, including staff/lead-level roles
- Deep expertise in NLP, speech recognition, or conversational AI
- Track record of shipping ML systems at massive scale (100M+ users)
- Expert-level Python; strong understanding of ML infrastructure and serving
- Experience with transformer architectures, ASR systems, or TTS pipelines
- Excellent cross-functional communication and technical leadership skills

## Benefits

- Staff-level equity and compensation package
- Hybrid Sydney-based role with flexibility
- Opportunity to shape AI features for Canva's global user base

jobs.title: Senior Machine Learning Engineer (Evaluations)
jobs.snippet: Build evaluation frameworks for Canva's design generation AI models. Senior ML Engineer working on automated evaluation systems for generative AI quality at scale.
jobs.description:
## About the Role

This Senior ML Engineer role focuses on building automated evaluation frameworks for Canva's design generation AI models. You'll be instrumental in ensuring the quality and safety of AI-generated content at scale.

## Responsibilities

- Design and build automated evaluation systems for generative AI models (image, text, design)
- Develop metrics, benchmarks, and quality assessment pipelines for AI-generated content
- Build scalable eval infrastructure supporting rapid iteration on generative models
- Implement human-in-the-loop evaluation processes and annotation pipelines
- Collaborate with the design generation team to improve model quality and safety
- Research and adopt state-of-the-art AI evaluation methodologies

## Requirements

- 5+ years of ML engineering experience
- Experience with evaluation frameworks for generative AI (LLMs, image generation)
- Strong Python skills with PyTorch or JAX expertise
- Understanding of human evaluation, RLHF, and AI safety fundamentals
- Experience building data pipelines for large-scale evaluation workloads
- Familiarity with diffusion models, VLMs, or multi-modal AI systems

## Benefits

- Canva equity and competitive senior-level compensation
- Hybrid Sydney-based with flexible working
- Work on AI evaluation for products used by 220M+ people worldwide

jobs.title: Senior Data Scientist
jobs.snippet: Lendi Group is seeking a Senior Data Scientist to work on advanced analytics, machine learning, and broader data science techniques. Solution scoping, design, development, and integration into business units.
jobs.description:
## About Lendi Group

Lendi Group is Australia's leading digital home loan platform, connecting borrowers with lenders through technology. The data science team drives key decisions in pricing, customer analytics, and product innovation.

## About the Role

As a Senior Data Scientist at Lendi Group, you'll work on intriguing challenges using advanced analytics, machine learning, and data science to build solutions that directly impact the home lending experience for Australians.

## Responsibilities

- Design and implement ML models and statistical solutions for pricing, customer segmentation, and risk
- Lead solution scoping and design in collaboration with business stakeholders
- Develop and integrate data science solutions into stakeholder business units
- Communicate complex findings to non-technical stakeholders with clarity
- Mentor junior data scientists and contribute to team best practices
- Drive experimentation frameworks and A/B testing programs

## Requirements

- 5+ years of data science experience in a production environment
- Expert-level Python (pandas, scikit-learn, XGBoost, PyTorch/TensorFlow)
- Strong SQL skills and experience with cloud data platforms (Snowflake, BigQuery)
- Experience with ML in financial services or lending domain preferred
- Strong statistical foundations: regression, classification, time series, Bayesian methods
- Excellent communication skills; ability to influence without authority

## Benefits

- Competitive senior-level salary + performance bonus
- Hybrid work from Sydney CBD
- Work on Australia's largest digital home loan platform

jobs.title: Lead Data Scientist
jobs.snippet: Lead a growing data science team at Lendi Group. Play a pivotal role in shaping data-driven solutions — leading and mentoring team, designing advanced ML and statistical models.
jobs.description:
## About the Role

Lendi Group is seeking a Lead Data Scientist to lead a growing data science team and play a pivotal role in shaping data-driven solutions across Australia's leading digital home loan platform.

## Responsibilities

- Lead and mentor a team of data scientists, setting technical direction and standards
- Design and implement advanced machine learning and statistical models for core business problems
- Drive the data science roadmap and align it with business priorities
- Own end-to-end delivery of data science solutions: from problem framing to production deployment
- Partner with engineering, product, and commercial teams to embed data-driven decision making
- Establish MLOps practices, model monitoring, and continuous improvement frameworks

## Requirements

- 7+ years of data science experience; 2+ years in a lead or management role
- Expert Python and ML skills; strong SQL and data engineering fundamentals
- Experience leading data science teams in a fast-paced, product-focused environment
- Track record of delivering production ML systems with measurable business impact
- Strong stakeholder management and communication skills
- Experience in fintech, proptech, or financial services preferred

## Benefits

- Senior leadership-level compensation + equity
- Hybrid Sydney CBD with flexible arrangements
- High-impact role shaping the future of home lending in Australia

jobs.title: Automation and AI Engineer
jobs.snippet: Full-time permanent role in NobleOak's IT department. Build and deploy AI automation solutions to support business operations. Sydney CBD office location.
jobs.description:
## About NobleOak Life Insurance

NobleOak is one of Australia's leading direct life insurance providers, known for award-winning products and a customer-first approach. The IT team drives digital innovation supporting the company's rapid growth.

## About the Role

Join NobleOak's IT department as an Automation and AI Engineer in a full-time, permanent role based in Sydney CBD. You'll design and deploy AI-powered automation solutions that improve operational efficiency across the business.

## Responsibilities

- Design, build, and maintain AI and automation solutions for business processes
- Develop and deploy machine learning models for operational use cases
- Build integrations between AI systems and existing enterprise applications
- Collaborate with business stakeholders to identify automation opportunities
- Maintain and monitor production AI systems; manage model performance
- Contribute to the company's AI strategy and technology roadmap

## Requirements

- 3–5 years of experience in software/AI engineering or automation
- Proficiency in Python and experience with ML frameworks
- Experience with RPA tools, workflow automation, or process mining
- Understanding of cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or GCP)
- Strong communication skills and ability to work with non-technical stakeholders
- Experience in insurance or financial services is advantageous

## Benefits

- Full-time permanent position with competitive salary
- Sydney CBD office with hybrid flexibility
- Stable, growing company with strong market position in Australian life insurance

jobs.title: Data Engineer (AI & Geoscience)
jobs.snippet: Earth AI seeks an early to mid-career Data Engineer for their AI & Geoscience team in Alexandria, Sydney. Salary $130,000–$160,000 p.a. plus quarterly performance bonus.
jobs.description:
## About Earth AI

Earth AI is an Australian AI company applying machine learning and geoscience data to transform how the world finds critical minerals. Based in Alexandria, Sydney, Earth AI is at the forefront of AI-powered resource discovery.

## About the Role

Earth AI is seeking an early to mid-career Data Engineer to join their AI & Geoscience team. You'll build and maintain data infrastructure that powers AI models used for mineral exploration at scale.

## Responsibilities

- Build and maintain data pipelines ingesting geological, geophysical, and geochemical datasets
- Design and implement scalable data infrastructure supporting ML model training and inference
- Collaborate with ML engineers and geoscientists to understand data requirements
- Ensure data quality, governance, and observability across the data platform
- Develop APIs and services enabling data access for AI model development
- Contribute to cloud infrastructure management and optimisation

## Requirements

- 2–5 years of data engineering experience
- Strong Python skills; experience with Apache Spark, dbt, or Airflow
- Proficiency with cloud data platforms (AWS, GCP, or Azure)
- Experience with SQL databases and data warehousing solutions
- Interest in AI/ML applications in science or resources sectors
- Collaborative mindset; passion for working with passionate and supportive colleagues

## Benefits

- Salary: $130,000–$160,000 p.a. + quarterly performance bonus
- Full-time permanent role based in Alexandria, Sydney
- Work at the intersection of AI and critical minerals — a high-impact global mission

jobs.title: Data Scientist
jobs.snippet: SEEK is hiring Data Scientists focusing on experimentation to drive product innovation and improve user experiences. Candidate-job matching using machine learning.
jobs.description:
## About SEEK

SEEK is Australia's #1 employment marketplace, helping millions of people find jobs and businesses find talent. SEEK's data science team uses machine learning to power candidate-job matching, search, and personalisation at scale.

## About the Role

Join SEEK's data science team in Melbourne as a Data Scientist focused on experimentation and product innovation. You'll work with large-scale job market data to improve the matching of candidates with opportunities.

## Responsibilities

- Design and execute experiments to drive product innovation and improve user outcomes
- Build and deploy ML models for candidate-job matching, search ranking, and recommendations
- Analyse large-scale behavioural data to identify product improvement opportunities
- Develop A/B testing frameworks and measure causal impact of product changes
- Collaborate with product managers and engineers to ship data-driven features
- Contribute to SEEK's Responsible AI initiatives

## Requirements

- 3–5 years of data science experience in a product or tech environment
- Strong Python skills (pandas, scikit-learn, PyTorch/TensorFlow)
- Proficiency in SQL and experience with large-scale data processing
- Experience with A/B testing, causal inference, or experimentation design
- Solid statistical foundation: regression, classification, Bayesian methods
- Experience with recommendation systems or information retrieval is a plus

## Benefits

- Competitive salary at one of Australia's most innovative tech companies
- Hybrid Melbourne-based role with generous flexible working
- Meaningful mission: helping Australians find work and thrive

jobs.title: Data Scientist, LLM & AI Agent Engineer
jobs.snippet: Working on AI agents integrated into live Binance systems. Design, prototype, and iterate on LLM-powered agent workflows using LangChain, LangGraph. Build data-driven insights for AI system performance.
jobs.description:
## About the Role

This hybrid Data Scientist and LLM Engineer role at Binance sits at the intersection of data science and AI agent development. You'll contribute to the design and deployment of AI agent systems integrated into Binance's live operational infrastructure.

## Responsibilities

- Design, prototype, and iterate LLM-powered AI agent workflows for production use
- Build data analysis pipelines to measure and optimise agent performance
- Use LangChain, LangGraph, and similar frameworks to develop agentic systems
- Develop monitoring dashboards and KPI reporting for LLM-powered systems
- Conduct data-driven experiments to validate agent improvements
- Collaborate with engineering, product, and operations teams

## Requirements

- 3–5 years of combined data science and ML/AI engineering experience
- Strong Python skills; experience with LLM APIs (OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini)
- Proficiency in SQL and data analysis; experience with pandas and visualisation tools
- Familiarity with LangChain, LangGraph, or similar agentic frameworks
- Understanding of prompt engineering, RAG, and agent evaluation methodologies
- Experience in fintech or regulated environments is a plus

## Benefits

- Competitive compensation in a global fintech leader
- Hybrid Sydney-based role
- Exposure to cutting-edge LLM and agent engineering at global scale

jobs.title: 大模型算法工程师（暑期实习）
jobs.snippet: 字节跳动2026暑期实习。聚焦大模型核心技术与应用落地，方向涵盖预训练、后训练（SFT/RLHF/DPO）、推理优化、多模态大模型。面向2027届应届生，北京岗位，转正机会充足。
jobs.description:
## 关于字节跳动

字节跳动是全球领先的科技公司，旗下拥有抖音、TikTok、飞书、今日头条等产品。AI研究与大模型是字节跳动当前最核心的战略方向，提供超5000个暑期实习岗位。

## 岗位职责

- 参与大模型预训练、后训练技术研究与工程实现（SFT、RLHF、DPO等方向）
- 开展大模型推理优化、模型压缩、分布式训练等方向的研究与开发
- 配合核心团队完成多模态大模型相关算法实验与落地
- 对训练数据质量进行分析与优化
- 撰写技术文档与实验报告

## 任职要求

- 计算机科学、人工智能、数学相关专业本科及以上在读（2027届应届生优先）
- 熟练掌握Python及深度学习框架（PyTorch为主）
- 有大模型训练或微调实践经验者优先
- 熟悉Transformer架构及主流预训练技术（GPT/LLaMA/Qwen等）
- 每周到岗≥3天，实习时长≥3个月；表现优异者可获秋招直通卡

## 福利待遇

- 有竞争力的实习薪资（北京市场领先水平）
- 专属Mentor 1v1指导
- 优秀实习生转正通道及秋招内推优先
- 字节跳动北京办公室（朝阳区），餐补、免费三餐

jobs.title: 推荐系统算法工程师（暑期实习）
jobs.snippet: 字节跳动推荐算法/AIGC暑期实习。负责抖音、今日头条等亿级用户平台的推荐系统建模与优化。涉及召回、排序、精排等各阶段算法，并探索AIGC技术在推荐中的融合应用。
jobs.description:
## 岗位职责

- 负责字节跳动核心产品（抖音/今日头条/西瓜视频等）推荐系统的算法建模与优化
- 参与召回、粗排、精排、重排各阶段算法研究与工程实现
- 探索大模型（LLM/AIGC）技术与推荐系统的融合应用
- 设计并实施在线A/B实验，分析推荐效果并持续迭代
- 处理亿级用户行为数据，优化特征工程与模型训练流程

## 任职要求

- 计算机科学、人工智能、统计学等相关专业在读研究生或本科生（2027届）
- 熟练Python，熟悉深度学习框架（PyTorch/TensorFlow）
- 有推荐系统、计算广告或NLP/CV相关项目经验者优先
- 理解机器学习基础：DNN、Embedding、Attention机制等
- 每周≥3天到岗，实习时长≥3个月；表现优异者可获转正机会

## 福利待遇

- 竞争力强的实习薪资（上海市场顶级水平）
- 上海张江 / 杨浦办公区，配套餐补
- 优秀实习生转正通道及内推直通秋招

jobs.title: 大模型算法工程师（实习）
jobs.snippet: 阿里通义实验室招聘2026届暑期/日常实习生。面向对话大模型、代码模型、Agent方向的算法研究。工作地点：北京/杭州。本硕博皆可投递。
jobs.description:
## 关于通义实验室

通义实验室是阿里巴巴集团的大模型核心研究机构，负责研发通义千问（Qwen）系列大模型，在全球大模型竞争中处于第一梯队。实验室聚焦对话大模型、多模态模型、代码智能与Agent方向。

## 岗位职责

- 参与大语言模型（LLM）核心算法研发，涵盖预训练、对齐（RLHF/DPO）、推理等方向
- 开展对话AI、代码模型、多模态LLM相关算法实验与工程实现
- 探索Agent框架、RAG系统及LLM在垂直场景的落地应用
- 参与模型评测、数据质量治理及训练优化工作
- 与国际顶级研究者合作，产出高质量研究成果

## 任职要求

- 人工智能、计算机科学、统计学等相关专业本科及以上在读（2026届暑期实习或日常实习均可投递）
- 熟悉深度学习基础，掌握PyTorch框架
- 有大模型相关项目或研究经历（论文/开源贡献）优先
- 每周可到岗≥3天；实习地点：北京或杭州（可沟通）

## 福利待遇

- 阿里集团顶级实习薪资，餐补、交通补贴齐全
- 顶尖科研环境，Mentor均为业界知名研究者
- 优秀实习生享有阿里秋招直通绿色通道

jobs.title: AI算法工程师（实习）
jobs.snippet: 阿里云2026届实习生招聘999个名额。涵盖机器学习、NLP、计算机视觉、AI平台工程等方向。工作地点以杭州（总部）为主，亦有北京/上海岗位。
jobs.description:
## 关于阿里云

阿里云是全球领先的云计算和AI服务商，连续多年在中国公有云市场位居第一。AI算法团队负责云上AI服务（PAI平台、通义API、灵积等）的核心算法研发与工程落地。

## 岗位职责（根据具体方向）

- **机器学习方向**：参与云原生ML平台的算法研发，优化训练、推理、AutoML等核心模块
- **NLP/大模型方向**：参与自然语言理解、文本生成、Embedding模型的研发与优化
- **CV方向**：图像识别、目标检测、多模态视觉算法开发与工程实现
- 与工程团队协作，将算法模块集成到阿里云AI服务中

## 任职要求

- 计算机科学、人工智能、数学统计等相关专业本科及以上在读（日常实习不限年级）
- 熟悉Python，掌握至少一种深度学习框架（PyTorch/TensorFlow）
- 有ML/CV/NLP相关项目经验或科研经历者优先
- 每周到岗≥3天，实习周期≥3个月

## 福利待遇

- 阿里云竞争力实习薪资（杭州市场领先）
- 杭州西溪园区，配套餐厅、班车、健身房
- 优秀实习生享阿里秋招直通资格（阿里星计划）

jobs.title: AI算法工程师（大模型，暑期实习）
jobs.snippet: 腾讯2026暑期实习。参与微信/混元大模型应用工程，包括RAG系统、Agent系统、大模型分布式推理与后训练开发。要求计算机相关专业本科及以上，熟悉C++/Python，了解大模型技术栈。
jobs.description:
## 关于腾讯大模型业务

腾讯将大模型列为2026年投入力度最大的核心方向，推出混元大模型及「青云计划」专项AI人才培养项目。实习岗位覆盖微信、混元、腾讯云等多个核心大模型产品线，转正HC充足。

## 岗位职责

- 参与大模型应用工程开发，包括RAG系统、Agent系统搭建与优化
- 参与大模型分布式推理和分布式后训练相关开发工作（SFT/RLHF/DPO）
- 设计并实现高性能推理服务，优化大模型延迟与吞吐量
- 与算法团队协作，将大模型能力集成到微信等亿级用户产品中

## 任职要求

- 计算机相关专业本科及以上在读（2027届及以后；硕士优先）
- 熟练掌握Python；熟悉Linux开发环境；有C++开发经验优先
- 熟悉数据结构与算法，掌握至少一种深度学习框架
- 了解大模型推理（vLLM/TensorRT-LLM）、训练（Megatron/DeepSpeed）等技术栈
- 每周到岗≥3天，实习时长≥3个月

## 福利待遇

- 腾讯市场领先的实习薪资，餐补、交通补贴
- 深圳滨海大厦办公，顶尖工程师团队
- 表现优异者可直通腾讯校招，海量转正HC

jobs.title: AI算法工程师（暑期实习）
jobs.snippet: 华为2026暑期实习。方向涵盖大模型数据技术、后训练与强化学习、Agent技术、AI模型评测及AI算法工程。截止2026年5月31日，面向2027届本科/硕士，深圳/北京岗位。
jobs.description:
## 关于华为

华为是全球领先的ICT基础设施和智能终端提供商。华为诺亚方舟实验室及2012实验室是华为AI核心研发机构，在大模型、具身智能、AI芯片等领域处于全球前沿。

## 岗位职责（根据具体方向）

- **大模型后训练**：参与强化学习（RLHF/PPO/GRPO）方向的算法研究与实现
- **Agent技术**：研发AI Agent框架，探索工具使用、多步规划、记忆系统等方向
- **AI模型评测**：设计大模型能力评测体系，研究自动化评估方法
- **AI算法工程**：负责模型训练、推理加速、分布式训练系统开发
- 配合顶级算力资源开展真实业务场景下的AI研究

## 任职要求

- 人工智能、计算机科学、数学相关专业本科或硕士在读（面向2027届）
- 熟悉Python及深度学习框架（PyTorch/MindSpore）
- 对大模型训练、强化学习或Agent系统有深入理解
- 可实习3个月以上，深圳/北京均有岗位（截止2026年5月31日）

## 福利待遇

- 华为竞争力实习薪资，提供住宿补贴
- 专属导师1v1全程指导
- 体系化培养，覆盖AI核心业务与前沿研究；优秀实习生转正通道

jobs.title: 机器学习算法工程师（实习）
jobs.snippet: 百度2026暑期实习。大模型/机器学习算法方向，包括文心大模型预训练、数据挖掘、NLP、推荐算法。AI岗超九成。面向2027届，北京/上海/深圳多城市。
jobs.description:
## 关于百度

百度是中国领先的AI和互联网公司，文心大模型（ERNIE）在对话、代码、多模态领域持续领跑。百度2026校招AI岗位占比超90%，开放超4000个Offer，推出「文心登峰技术培训生计划」。

## 岗位职责

- 参与文心大模型预训练、后训练及推理优化工作
- 开展数据挖掘、统计学习领域的前沿技术研究
- 大规模机器学习算法研究及并行化实现
- 参与NLP、推荐系统、多模态算法的工程研发
- 与文心事业部核心团队协作，将算法落地到实际产品中

## 任职要求

- 计算机科学、人工智能等相关专业本科及以上在读（2027届；暑期实习项目面向2027届）
- 熟练Python，掌握深度学习框架（PyTorch为主）
- 有ML/NLP/大模型相关项目经验者优先
- 每周可到岗≥3天，实习时长≥3个月；北京为主，多城市岗位开放

## 福利待遇

- 4万+超丰富内部课程，免费早餐夜宵
- Mentor 1v1指导；百度CTO王海峰博士亲自参与「文心登峰」项目指导
- 优秀实习生转正通道；年节限定礼盒等福利

jobs.title: 机器学习工程师
jobs.snippet: Keep招聘机器学习工程师，薪资25k-60k。负责运动健康场景下的ML模型研发与优化，涉及用户行为预测、个性化推荐及AI健身教练功能的算法建设。
jobs.description:
## 关于Keep

Keep是中国领先的运动健康科技平台，用户超3亿，提供AI驱动的健身课程、运动数据分析和社区功能。ML团队负责运动识别、个性化推荐、用户增长和变现算法的核心研发。

## 岗位职责

- 负责Keep平台用户个性化推荐、内容分发及运动行为预测算法研发
- 开发运动AI相关模型：动作识别、姿态估计、运动效果预测等
- 构建特征工程体系，优化在线学习和增量训练流程
- 设计离线评估与在线A/B实验体系，持续迭代算法效果
- 参与ML平台能力建设，提升模型训练与服务效率

## 任职要求

- 1-3年机器学习工程经验
- 熟练Python，掌握scikit-learn/XGBoost/PyTorch等主流ML框架
- 有推荐系统、用户行为建模或计算机视觉实践经验
- 熟悉Spark/Hadoop等大数据处理工具
- 理解模型上线流程，有生产环境ML经验

## 福利待遇

- 薪资区间：25k–60k/月（北京，基于经验水平）
- 五险一金、弹性工作时间
- 北京办公室（海淀/朝阳），Keep健康福利

jobs.title: NLP算法工程师
jobs.snippet: 美团招聘NLP算法工程师，负责生活服务场景下的自然语言处理算法研发，涵盖大模型应用、智能搜索、文本分类与信息抽取。上海岗位，月薪35k-60k。
jobs.description:
## 关于美团

美团是中国领先的生活服务电商平台，连接2.5亿年活跃用户与900万商家。NLP团队负责搜索、问答、评论分析、智能客服等核心AI能力的研发，是美团AI中台的重要组成部分。

## 岗位职责

- 研发美团生活服务场景下的NLP算法：信息抽取、文本分类、语义理解、问答系统
- 将大模型（LLM）能力融合到搜索、推荐、智能客服等业务场景
- 构建和优化RAG系统、知识图谱等AI基础能力
- 设计和实施NLP模型的工程化部署，保障在线服务稳定性和低延迟
- 参与A/B实验设计与效果评估，驱动业务指标持续提升

## 任职要求

- 1-3年NLP或机器学习工程经验
- 熟练Python，掌握深度学习框架（PyTorch/TensorFlow）
- 熟悉主流NLP模型：BERT/GPT/Llama等Transformer架构
- 有大模型微调（SFT/LoRA）或RAG系统实践经验者优先
- 较好的工程能力，熟悉模型服务化（TorchServe/vLLM/FastAPI）

## 福利待遇

- 月薪：35k–60k（上海，视经验水平）
- 美团全面福利包：五险一金、年终奖、餐饮补贴
- 上海办公区（浦东/徐汇），扁平化团队文化

jobs.title: 数据科学家
jobs.snippet: 腾讯视频招聘数据科学家，负责视频推荐、用户画像、内容分析等核心数据科学工作。经理直招，北京办公。涉及大规模用户行为数据分析与ML建模。
jobs.description:
## 关于腾讯视频

腾讯视频是中国最大的长视频平台之一，月活用户超5亿。数据科学团队负责用户增长、内容推荐、变现效率等核心指标的数据建模与分析。

## 岗位职责

- 负责腾讯视频用户行为分析、用户画像建设和推荐系统数据科学工作
- 设计并实施用户增长、内容分发效率等关键指标的数学模型
- 开发预测模型支持视频推荐、广告变现及精细化运营
- 设计A/B实验方案，提供数据驱动的产品决策依据
- 与机器学习工程师协作，将数据科学模型推进到线上生产

## 任职要求

- 3-5年数据科学或机器学习工程实际工作经验
- 熟练Python（pandas/scikit-learn/XGBoost）及SQL
- 有推荐系统、用户行为建模或内容分发相关经验优先
- 熟悉统计学方法：假设检验、贝叶斯推断、因果推断
- 良好的业务理解能力，能将数据洞察转化为业务改进行动

## 福利待遇

- 腾讯集团竞争力薪资体系，30k-55k/月（视经验）
- 北京腾讯总部，顶尖数据科学团队
- 五险一金、股票激励、弹性工作

jobs.title: 数据工程师
jobs.snippet: 字节跳动数据平台社招数据工程师。负责大规模数据基础设施建设，支撑AI模型训练与推理数据需求。涉及数据湖、实时数仓、数据质量及AI数据管道。北京岗位。
jobs.description:
## 关于字节跳动数据平台

字节跳动数据平台支撑抖音、TikTok、今日头条等全球产品的数据基础设施，每日处理PB级数据，是公司AI能力的核心底座。团队在实时数据处理、数据湖架构、AI数据工程等领域保持全球领先。

## 岗位职责

- 设计与构建大规模数据管道，支撑AI模型训练数据的采集、清洗与特征工程
- 开发和维护实时数仓（Flink/Spark Streaming）和离线数仓（Hive/Spark）体系
- 建设AI训练数据质量监控体系，保障数据完整性与一致性
- 参与数据湖（Hudi/Iceberg）架构设计与优化
- 与ML工程师协作，设计高效的特征存储与在线数据服务

## 任职要求

- 3-5年数据工程实际工作经验
- 熟练Python/Scala，掌握Spark/Flink等大数据处理框架
- 有实时数据处理和数据仓库建设经验
- 熟悉数据湖存储格式（Parquet/ORC/Iceberg）
- 有AI/ML数据管道工程经验者优先

## 福利待遇

- 字节跳动竞争力薪资（25k-50k/月，视经验）
- 北京朝阳区办公，三餐补贴
- 股票激励（RSU），五险一金，弹性工作

jobs.title: 资深 AI 产品经理
jobs.snippet: 钉钉AI产品经理，负责大模型在企业办公协作产品的应用探索及AI相关平台与业务产品的规划、设计和落地。工作地点杭州，AI岗位占比80%，要求具备AI产品或算法工作经验。
jobs.description:
## 关于钉钉

钉钉是阿里巴巴旗下的企业级办公协作平台，服务超700万企业用户。AI是钉钉2026年的核心战略，AI岗位占比高达80%。团队负责将通义大模型能力深度集成到智能会议、文档、工作流、AI助手等核心产品中。

## 岗位职责

- 负责大模型在企业办公场景（智能文档、AI助手、工作流自动化）中的产品应用探索
- 主导AI相关平台产品的规划、需求设计与上线落地
- 与通义实验室、工程团队紧密协作，将大模型能力转化为用户价值
- 深入分析企业客户（B端）的AI需求，制定产品迭代路线图
- 跟踪AI产品效果数据，持续优化用户体验和商业指标

## 任职要求

- 5年以上产品经理经验，其中2年以上AI产品、互联网产品或算法方向工作经验
- 对大模型技术（LLM/Agent/RAG）有深入理解，能与技术团队有效沟通
- 有B端SaaS或企业服务产品经验者优先
- 优秀的需求分析与产品设计能力；数据驱动决策思维
- 可远程办公，偏好杭州总部办公者优先

## 福利待遇

- 阿里巴巴P7+级别薪资体系，阿里RSU股票激励
- 杭州西溪园区或远程办公
- 阿里健康、年终奖、丰富内部培训资源
